---
id: get-config-toml
title: "GetConfigToml"
description: "Retrieves the full config in TOML format, including default configs with schemas, dimensions, and overrides. This endpoint is optimized for clients that prefer TOML format for configuration management."
sidebar_label: "GetConfigToml"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/superposition
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"GetConfigToml"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/config/toml"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves the full config in TOML format, including default configs with schemas, dimensions, and overrides. This endpoint is optimized for clients that prefer TOML format for configuration management.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"if-modified-since","in":"header","description":"While using this, 304 response is treated as error, which needs to be handled separately by checking the response code of the http response. This is required to make sure that clients can cache the response and avoid unnecessary calls when there are no updates.","schema":{"type":"string","description":"While using this, 304 response is treated as error, which needs to be handled separately by checking the response code of the http response. This is required to make sure that clients can cache the response and avoid unnecessary calls when there are no updates."}},{"name":"x-org-id","in":"header","schema":{"type":"string"},"required":true},{"name":"x-workspace","in":"header","schema":{"type":"string"},"required":true}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
